transformation.operation: conceptual workflow rendering from the documented algorithm

figures.caption_claim: A target-specific sparse correction record reconstructs the selected reference trajectory under a fixed target environment.

supported_manuscript_claims.claim: During replay, corrections are applied before extending the prefix, which prevents a local disagreement from cascading.

limitations: Conceptual workflow; not an empirical result.

transformation.operation: exact-replay counts and prompt-level correction-rate plotting

figures.caption_claim: Certificates recovered 60 of 60 trajectories while prompt-level correction rates remained low.

supported_manuscript_claims.claim: Certificate-corrected replay recovered 60 of 60 token trajectories, whereas uncorrected replay recovered 10 of 60 (Table 1 and Fig. 2a).
supported_manuscript_claims.locator: Results: Exact replay scales across bilingual prompts

supported_manuscript_claims.claim: The mean correction rate was 2.16% (prompt-cluster bootstrap 95% confidence interval, 1.80-2.53%), with a maximum trial rate of 6.15% and prompt-level variation shown in Fig. 2b.
supported_manuscript_claims.locator: Results: Exact replay scales across bilingual prompts

limitations: Fixed prompt set on one model and GPU stack.

figures.caption_claim: Top-four retained more source mass and reduced the truncation component but did not reduce correction density.

supported_manuscript_claims.claim: The distributional improvement did not produce a reliability improvement.
supported_manuscript_claims.locator: Results: Contract width exposes a distribution-reliability Pareto frontier

limitations: One public seed per contract-width condition.

figures.caption_claim: Correction density and retained mass were similar after reversing FP16 and BF16 within the tested stack.

supported_manuscript_claims.claim: These data support bidirectional precision replay on the tested model and GPU stack.
supported_manuscript_claims.locator: Results: Replay is stable in both FP16/BF16 directions within the tested environment

limitations: One public seed per precision direction; same GPU stack.
